title: Tracking Daily Calorie Intake in C

content.problemStatement: Write a program to calculate the total calories consumed in a day through three meals. Then subtract the calories burned during exercise to find the net calorie intake. Use the addition (`+`) and subtraction (`-`) operators, and display all values clearly.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 10), the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains four space‑separated integers: breakfast, lunch, dinner and calories_burned.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case output three lines in the exact order:
Total Calories Consumed: <total_calories>
Calories Burned: <calories_burned>
Net Calorie Intake: <net_calorie_intake>
Separate consecutive test cases by a blank line.

sampleTestCases.output:
Total Calories Consumed: 1450
Calories Burned: 400
Net Calorie Intake: 1050

Total Calories Consumed: 2000
Calories Burned: 500
Net Calorie Intake: 1500

Total Calories Consumed: 1000
Calories Burned: 200
Net Calorie Intake: 800

Total Calories Consumed: 750
Calories Burned: 100
Net Calorie Intake: 650
sampleTestCases.explanation: Only one test case. Meals sum to 750, burned 100, net 650.

sampleTestCases.output:
Total Calories Consumed: 1500
Calories Burned: 400
Net Calorie Intake: 1100

Total Calories Consumed: 450
Calories Burned: 0
Net Calorie Intake: 450
sampleTestCases.explanation: First case: 1000+200+300=1500, burned 400, net 1100. Second case: 150+150+150=450, burned 0, net 450.

Calories Burned: 500

solution.approach: For each test case we simply add the three meal calorie values to obtain the total calories consumed. Then we subtract the calories burned during exercise to get the net calorie intake. The operations are O(1) per test case, so the overall complexity is linear in the number of test cases. No extra data structures are needed.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) where T is the number of test cases

code.Java:
import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));String line=br.readLine();if(line==null||line.isEmpty())return;int T=Integer.parseInt(line.trim());StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int tc=0;tc<T;tc++){StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());int breakfast=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int lunch=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int dinner=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int caloriesBurned=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int total=breakfast+lunch+dinner;int net=total-caloriesBurned;sb.append("Total Calories Consumed: ").append(total).append('
');sb.append("Calories Burned: ").append(caloriesBurned).append('
');sb.append("Net Calorie Intake: ").append(net);if(tc!=T-1)sb.append("

");}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
